svg.title: OllamaService call flow from Razor page to Ollama server and back
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full request and response journey: Razor page builds OllamaChatRequest, injects into IOllamaService, OllamaService builds messages, posts to Ollama HTTP API, parses reply, returns OllamaChatResponse, Razor updates chat history and UI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Ollama HTTP API?')
